redis.clients.jedis.timeseries

Class TSRangeParams

  • java.lang.Object
    • redis.clients.jedis.timeseries.TSRangeParams
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IParams

    public class TSRangeParams
extends Object
implements IParams
    Represents optional arguments of TS.RANGE and TS.REVRANGE commands.
